name: SystemPrompt Code Orchestrator MCP
what_it_does: SystemPrompt Code Orchestrator MCP server enabling AI agents to orchestrate multi-step code generation and modification workflows — breaking down complex coding tasks into sub-tasks, coordinating between multiple AI agents or tools, managing code context across file operations, and integrating structured code orchestration into agent-driven software development workflows.
use_cases: Breaking down complex coding tasks into structured subtasks from coding orchestrator agents
Coordinating multi-file refactoring across a codebase from architecture agents
Managing long coding sessions with context across multiple steps
Orchestrating sequential code generation and testing from CI agents
Building structured software development workflows from DevOps agents
Coordinating between multiple AI coding tools from orchestration agents
not_for: Simple single-file code generation (overkill for basic tasks)
Teams not using AI-assisted coding workflows
Production deployment automation (this is development workflow focused)
best_when: An AI coding agent needs to manage complex, multi-step software development tasks with structured task decomposition and context management across file operations.
avoid_when: You need simple code generation — use Claude Code or Cursor directly without orchestration overhead.

auth.notes: SystemPrompt.io API key may be required for cloud features. Local orchestration may work without API key.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Local orchestration likely free; cloud features may require SystemPrompt.io account
pricing.notes: Community/commercial MCP from SystemPrompt.io. Core features may be open source; cloud orchestration may require account.

performance.rate_limits: Depends on LLM APIs used for sub-task execution

known_agent_gotchas: Orchestration complexity adds latency and potential failure points
LLM API costs multiply when orchestrating multiple sub-agents
Context management between sub-tasks requires careful prompt engineering
Community/commercial MCP — service availability depends on SystemPrompt.io
Complex orchestration workflows can produce unexpected code changes
Sub-task results need human review — orchestrators can accumulate errors across steps
agent_readiness.security_notes: Code orchestration can make broad filesystem changes — scope carefully. API key for SystemPrompt.io if used. Community/commercial MCP. Code changes should be reviewed before committing.

security_score_components.security_notes: Broad code changes — scope carefully. API key if cloud used. Review orchestrated changes before commit.
